mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCTS ( prod_no, prod_nm, prod_type, min_prd_mon, max_prd_mon, min_amt, max_amt, tgt_lrg, tgt_dtl, prod_desc, int_pay_type, apld_exch_type, reg_dt, reg_by, rate_cat, apv_stat_cd ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCTS.NEXTVAL, #{product_name}, #{product_type}, #{min_period_month}, #{max_period_month}, #{min_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{max_amount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{target_large}, #{target_detail}, #{product_desc}, #{interest_payment_type}, #{applied_exchange_rate_type}, SYSDATE, #{created_by}, #{rate_category}, #{approve_status} )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_PDFS ( pdf_no, prod_no, basic_terms_path, cat_terms_path, spec_terms_path, prod_guide_path, reg_dt ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_PDFS.NEXTVAL, #{product_id}, #{basic_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{special_terms_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_guide_path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_REQUESTS ( req_no, prod_no, req_usr_no, req_stat_cd, req_type, req_dt ) VALUES ( SEQ_PRODUCT_REQUESTS.NEXTVAL, #{product_id},
( SELECT A.adm_no FROM ADMIN_USERS A JOIN PRODUCTS P ON A.name = P.reg_by WHERE P.prod_no = #{product_id} ),
'WAITING', 'CREATE', SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT prod_no AS product_id, prod_nm AS product_name, active, prod_type AS product_type, min_amt AS min_amount, max_amt AS max_amount, min_prd_mon AS min_period_month, max_prd_mon AS max_period_month, apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, reg_dt AS create_date, reg_by AS created_by, active AS is_active, tgt_lrg AS target_large, tgt_dtl AS target_detail, rate_cat AS rate_category
FROM PRODUCTS ORDER BY prod_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.prod_no AS product_id, P.active AS active, P.prod_nm AS product_name, P.prod_type AS product_type,
P.min_prd_mon AS min_period_month, P.max_prd_mon AS max_period_month,
P.min_amt AS min_amount, P.max_amt AS max_amount,
P.tgt_lrg AS target_large, P.tgt_dtl AS target_detail,
P.prod_desc AS product_desc,
P.int_pay_type AS interest_payment_type, P.apld_exch_type AS applied_exchange_rate_type,
P.reg_dt AS create_date, P.update_dt AS update_date,
P.reg_by AS created_by, P.approver AS approver, P.apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, P.upd_by AS updated_by,
P.app_start_dt AS app_start_date, P.app_end_dt AS app_end_date,
P.rate_cat AS rate_category,
PDF.basic_terms_path AS basic_terms_path, PDF.cat_terms_path AS category_terms_path, PDF.spec_terms_path AS special_terms_path, PDF.prod_guide_path AS product_guide_path
FROM PRODUCTS P
LEFT JOIN PRODUCT_PDFS PDF ON P.prod_no = PDF.prod_no
WHERE P.prod_no = #{product_id}

SELECT prod_no AS product_id, prod_nm AS product_name, prod_type AS product_type, apv_stat_cd AS approve_status, reg_dt AS create_date, reg_by AS created_by, active AS active
FROM PRODUCTS
WHERE apv_stat_cd = #{approve_status}
ORDER BY prod_no DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE PRODUCTS
prod_nm = #{product_name},
prod_type = #{product_type},
min_prd_mon = #{min_period_month},
max_prd_mon = #{max_period_month},
min_amt = #{min_amount},
max_amt = #{max_amount},
tgt_lrg = #{target_large},
tgt_dtl = #{target_detail},
prod_desc = #{product_desc},
int_pay_type = #{interest_payment_type},
apld_exch_type = #{applied_exchange_rate_type},
app_start_dt = #{app_start_date},
app_end_dt = #{app_end_date},
rate_cat = #{rate_category},
apv_stat_cd = 'SAVE',
update_dt = SYSDATE, upd_by = #{updated_by}
WHERE prod_no = #{product_id} AND apv_stat_cd = 'SAVE'

UPDATE PRODUCTS
prod_nm = #{product_name},
prod_type = #{product_type},
min_prd_mon = #{min_period_month},
max_prd_mon = #{max_period_month},
min_amt = #{min_amount},
max_amt = #{max_amount},
tgt_lrg = #{target_large},
tgt_dtl = #{target_detail},
prod_desc = #{product_desc},
int_pay_type = #{interest_payment_type},
apld_exch_type = #{applied_exchange_rate_type},
app_start_dt = #{app_start_date},
app_end_dt = #{app_end_date},
rate_cat = #{rate_category},
apv_stat_cd = 'SUBMIT',
update_dt = SYSDATE, upd_by = #{updated_by}
WHERE prod_no = #{product_id} AND apv_stat_cd = 'SAVE'

UPDATE PRODUCT_PDFS
basic_terms_path = #{basic_terms_path},
cat_terms_path = #{category_terms_path},
spec_terms_path = #{special_terms_path},
prod_guide_path = #{product_guide_path},
upd_dt = SYSDATE
WHERE prod_no = #{product_id}
